meaning: 博内尔岛[拉丁美洲](荷属安的列斯群岛中的大岛)
examples: A sea urchin is nestled in a coral formation off Bonaire Island.
Orange cup coral clusters on a pier piling on Bonaire Island in the West Indies.
New Zealand and Iceland charge fishers user fees and Mozambique and Bonaire charge tourists diving fees.
Residents and visitors on other Caribbean islands such as Aruba, Curacao and Bonaire could also find themselves getting drenched.
The government of the Netherlands Antilles and Aruba has issued a Tropical Storm Warning for the islands of Aruba, Bonaire and Curacao.
